caption:
Hi. I'm your missed call. You've never heard me — that's the point.

This week I took a boiler quote, an emergency call-out and a rewire. ~£1,400. Gone.

I'm only afraid of one thing: someone who always picks up.

Find out what I've cost you — free 60-second audit, link in bio. 👇 Or reply CAILLTE.

#plumber #electrician #tradesbusiness #ukandireland #missedcalls
